label: Pydantic
description: Data validation with Python type hints.

topics.label: BaseModel
topics.description: Define models with type-annotated fields. Automatic validation on instantiation.

topics.label: Field Types & Validators
topics.description: str, int, EmailStr, HttpUrl, Field(). Custom validators with @field_validator.

topics.label: Nested Models
topics.description: Models containing other models. Recursive validation.

topics.label: Serialization
topics.description: model_dump(), model_dump_json(), model_validate(). Convert to/from dict and JSON.

topics.label: Settings Management
topics.description: BaseSettings for env var parsing and .env file loading.
